mapper.insert: INSERT INTO reservation ( user_id, product_id, reserved_date, start_time, people, status, total_price, memo ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{productId}, #{reservedDate}, #{startTime}, #{people}, #{status}, #{totalPrice}, #{memo} )
mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, product_id, reserved_date, start_time, people, status, total_price, memo, created_at, updated_at FROM reservation WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.update: UPDATE reservation SET status = 'CANCELLED' WHERE id = #{id} AND status IN ('PENDING','CONFIRMED')
mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, product_id, reserved_date, start_time, people, status, total_price, memo, created_at, updated_at FROM reservation ORDER BY id DESC
